name: Precision Sniping: Competitive
short_description: Precision Sniper is an arcade simulation in which each level gets harder and harder, you will have to train your skills to beat your score and become the best sniper in the world.
detailed_description:
Become a true Sniper.

Precision Sniper is an arcade simulation in which each level gets harder and harder, you will have to train your skills to beat your score and become the best sniper in the world.

Can you get the bullseye?

Features:

Levels of increasing difficulty and range
Wind that affects trajectory of the arrows
Bronze, Silver & Gold medals for each level
